name: chart/stream
description: Streamgraph — stacked areas on a centered (silhouette) flowing baseline.

meta.name: Stream
meta.description: Streamgraph — stacked areas on a centered (silhouette) flowing baseline.

props.name: series
props.description: Series, each with values[] aligned to categories.

props.name: categories
props.description: X-axis labels aligned with each series values.

props.name: offset
props.description: silhouette centers the stack (streamgraph); zero is a baseline stack.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltips on hover.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: When true, renders a minimal variant without chart chrome.

examples.title: Streamgraph

whenToUse: Showing how several series ebb and flow over time as proportions of a whole
An organic, aesthetic alternative to a stacked area chart
whenNotToUse: Reading precise values — use LineChart or AreaChart
Few categories with exact comparison — use BarChart

related.name: AreaChart
related.reason: Use a zero-baseline stacked area for precise reading

intent.a11yRationale: Renders role="img" with a title and a fallback data table.
